description: List Wbs Code IDs for a given project

schema.description: Request body for fetching WBS code IDs with filtering options. All filters within a single filter object are applied as AND conditions, while multiple filter objects in the array are combined with ...

items.description: The WBS Code Filter is used to filter WBS codes based on various criteria.  All criteria within a single filter object are applied as AND conditions.

id.description: The ID of the WBS code to filter by.

scope.description: The scope of the WBS code to filter by.

search.description: The search term to filter by. Searching through the WBS code, description and names of attribute items.

segment_item.description: The Segment Items to filter by.

status.description: The status of the WBS code to filter by.
